prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次约1536→1334→1181→1142→1013名，整体呈持续前移趋势，近4年累计前移约523名；2025年基准约1013名，较2024年前移约129名 ，竞争热度逐年攀升；该校在河北省物理类招生计划2021年53人、2022年51人、2023年45人、2024年47人、2025年37人，2026年计划35人，较2025年减少 2人，呈持续小幅缩招态势，名额收紧加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第12名（较2025年第14名上升2位），稳居 全国顶尖工科院校前列，对高分考生吸引力持续增强；2026年高考周期声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音学校热度总排名第10（高热），短视频曝 光量大，反映报考关注度较高；未见明显投档断档记录；依托哈尔滨工业大学本部学科评估：机械工程A+、控制科学与工程A、计算机科学与技术A、材料科学与 工程A+、力学A+等，深圳校区共享师资与学科资源，工科实力突出，对物理类考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年招生专业聚焦信息类（计算机、通信）与智能类（人 工智能、机器人、自动化），均为当前高热工科方向；河北省2026年高考总人数约60.98万（较2025年60.68万略有增加），物理类考生估算约36.5万，竞争基数扩大。；校本部位于广东深圳，地处粤港澳大湾区核心，地域吸引力强；该校在河北省招生占比相对稳定，跨省报考热度不减。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综 合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年招生计划小幅缩招、软科排名上升及抖音高热关注度，在2025年基准1013名基础上预计竞争进一步加剧，位次继续前移；预测最低位次约970名 ，区间854–1086名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 1536 → 1334 → 1181 → 1142 → 1013, showing a continuous upward trend, with a cumulative increase of about 523 places over the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 1013, an increase of about 129 places compared to 2024, indicating rising competition; the university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Hebei Province was 53 in 2021, 51 in 2022, 45 in 2023, 47 in 2024, 37 in 2025, and 35 in 2026, a decrease of 2 from 2025, showing a continuous slight reduction in enrollment, tightening competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 12th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings (up 2 places from 14th in 2025), firmly among the top engineering universities in China, with increasing appeal to high-scoring students; the 2026 college entrance examination cycle reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin university popularity ranking is 10th (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting high application attention; no obvious enrollment gaps recorded; relying on the Harbin Institute of Technology's discipline evaluations: Mechanical Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Mechanics A+, etc., the Shenzhen campus shares faculty and disciplinary resources, with outstanding engineering strength, strong appeal to Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The 2026 enrollment majors focus on information (Computer, Communication) and intelligence (Artificial Intelligence, Robotics, Automation), all currently hot engineering directions; the total number of Hebei Province 2026 college entrance examination candidates is about 609,800 (slightly increased from 606,800 in 2025), with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 365,000, expanding the competition base; the main campus is located in Shenzhen, Guangdong, at the core of the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, with strong regional appeal; the university's enrollment proportion in Hebei Province is relatively stable, with cross-province application heat undiminished.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the continuous upward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the rise in Soft Science ranking, and high Douyin attention, competition is expected to further intensify on the 2025 baseline of 1013, with rankings continuing to move forward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 970, with a range of 854–1086.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the Physics Category only offers two Engineering Experimental Class categories, both high-heat directions. For rankings within the predicted range (854–1086), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 with Tier 1 as a sprint; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit, focus on Tier 1 Future Information category. Both majors include a free choice mechanism, allowing flexible selection based on personal interests.
